---
name: Smart Contract Improvement
about: Propose a change to one of the Clarity contracts
title: ""
labels: contract, enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Which contract

Which contract does this affect (for example `thesislock`, `thesislock-batch`, `thesislock-registry`)?

## Describe the change

A clear and concise description of the proposed change.

## Motivation

Why is this change worth making? What does it improve or enable?

## Backward compatibility

Deployed contracts cannot be edited in place. Describe any impact on existing
on-chain data, function signatures, or callers, and how it would be rolled out.
